title: Data Silos in Healthcare
summary: Healthcare providers face severe challenges with fragmented patient data across incompatible electronic health record systems. This lack of interoperability obstructs comprehensive patient views and drives up integration costs. Ultimately, it results in hazardous care gaps, redundant testing, and delayed critical diagnoses.
pain_point: Fragmented patient records across non-interoperable EHR systems prevent a holistic view of medical history.
impact_if_unsolved: Redundant tests, delayed diagnoses, and potentially dangerous drug interactions.

title: High Latency in Last-Mile Delivery
summary: Urban delivery operations suffer from extreme latency due to unpredictable traffic and suboptimal routing algorithms. Drivers waste time and fuel navigating inefficient paths, which disrupts delivery schedules and inflates operational costs. Consequently, end customers face delayed packages and inaccurate real-time tracking.
pain_point: Inefficient routing and urban congestion cause costly delays in last-mile e-commerce deliveries.
impact_if_unsolved: Missed delivery windows, high fuel costs, and customer frustration.
